case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. IRENEO A PAREDES

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $148.16 INTEREST, $46.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-04-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IRENEO A. PAREDES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $75.00 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT; REMAINING MONEY HELD TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. FURTHER, $75.00 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE GARNISHED FOR PAYMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT IRENEO A. PAREDES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $75.00 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT; REMAINING MONEY HELD TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. FURTHER, $75.00 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE GARNISHED FOR PAYMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
